title: AbsenceRecord
description: Per-athlete-per-session absence event. Carries tenant_id (CASCADE) + session_id (RESTRICT) + athlete_id (RESTRICT) + athlete_enrollment_id (RESTRICT) + optional reported_by_user_id (RESTRICT) + optional excused_by_user_id (RESTRICT). Mutually exclusive with AttendanceRecord — the two cannot co-exist for the same (session, athlete). NEVER carries application_id, organization_id, region_id, or scope_node_id directly.

session_id.description: The session the athlete missed. IMMUTABLE post-create.

athlete_enrollment_id.description: The roster row the athlete was on when they missed. IMMUTABLE post-create.

status.description: Enum: unexcused / excused / no_show_advance_notice_given / vacation / medical / bereavement.

absence_reason.description: Reason string. Advisory catalog in data/absence-reason-catalog.json.

explanation.description: Guardian's free-text explanation. Admin + HR visible only.

reported_at.description: When the absence was recorded. Distinct from session.starts_at — pre-notification records reported_at BEFORE session; auto-detection records reported_at AT reconciliation time.

reported_by_user_id.description: Guardian / athlete who self-reported. NULL for system-detected absences (ReconcileAttendanceJob).

documented_url_signed.description: S3 signed URL for supporting documentation (medical note). Safeguarding_officer + hr visible only.

excused_by_user_id.description: Admin who flipped the absence to excused. NULL until excusal.

excused_at.description: When the absence was excused. NULL until excusal.

counted_toward_freeze.description: Whether this absence counts toward the rolling-window freeze threshold. Auto-set based on status: unexcused=true; excused/no_show_advance_notice_given/vacation/medical/bereavement=false.

metadata.description: Free-form metadata. May contain no_show_fee_invoice_id when ChargeNoShowFeeJob dispatched.

x-invariants: One AbsenceRecord per (tenant_id, session_id, athlete_id) via partial unique index
Mutual exclusion with AttendanceRecord — no (session, athlete) can have both an AbsenceRecord and an AttendanceRecord
tenant_id + session_id + athlete_id + athlete_enrollment_id are IMMUTABLE post-create
excused_by_user_id + excused_at required together when status='excused' (set atomically on excusal)
counted_toward_freeze auto-derived from status — unexcused=true; every other status=false
Status transitions: unexcused ↔ excused (reversible with admin permission). Every other transition requires admin override with reason
Guardian self-report auto-flips status to 'excused' when reported > (session.starts_at - policy.advance_notice_threshold) AND absence_reason IN policy.auto_excuse_reasons
